description: Regression scenarios for E2E strategy mode selection, dry-run behavior, and flow generation boundaries.

evals.name: init-mode-no-existing-playwright
evals.prompt: Use ywc-e2e-test-strategy --init --ci for a repository with no playwright.config file.
expected_behavior: Plans Playwright setup, initial smoke test, and CI workflow updates.
Keeps any generated commands and files scoped to E2E setup.
anti_behavior: Inventing app routes not present in the supplied context.
Starting browser automation during strategy planning.

evals.name: flow-mode-single-user-flow
evals.prompt: Use ywc-e2e-test-strategy --flow checkout-happy-path for an app that already has Playwright configured.
expected_behavior: Generates or describes only the requested checkout-happy-path flow.
Reuses existing Playwright conventions from the supplied context.
Includes selectors, assertions, and setup assumptions that need confirmation.
anti_behavior: Auditing all E2E coverage instead of focusing on the named flow.
Calling live payment or external checkout services.

evals.name: anti-mutually-exclusive-modes
expected_behavior: Stops before writing files because the modes are mutually exclusive.
Returns NEEDS_CONTEXT and asks which one mode to run.
Does not silently choose one mode.
anti_behavior: Writing setup files before resolving the conflict.
